sections.paragraph:
Original: תּלה

Transliteration: tâlâh

Phonetic: taw-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. to hang
    1. (Qal)
      1. to hang
        1. to hang up (any object)
        2. to put to death by hanging
    2. (Niphal) to be hanged
    3. (Piel) to hang, hang up (for display)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2512

Part(s) of speech: Verb
